demonstration: Someone who studies living organisms is a biologist.
excluded_source_sentence: Someone who treats eye diseases is
interpretation: The fixed pair changed held-out behavior, but it did not generalize as a clean content-preserving preparation intervention. It repaired some expected-`an` labels while also changing many expected-`a` controls and frequently changing the answer word itself.
